Example_EN: The shop staff were friendly to every customer.
Example_CN: 店员对每位顾客都很友好。
MemoryTip: friend + ly：像朋友一样的态度。

Example_EN: She comes from a small town near the sea.
Example_CN: 她来自海边一座小镇。

Collocation: in front of;front door;at the front
Example_EN: Please wait in front of the school gate.
Example_CN: 请在学校大门前面等。

Example_EN: I eat fresh fruit every morning after breakfast.
Example_CN: 我每天早饭后吃新鲜水果。

Example_EN: The train was full of passengers this morning.
Example_CN: 今早火车挤满了乘客。

Example_EN: We had great fun at the beach yesterday.
Example_CN: 昨天我们在海滩玩得很开心。

Example_EN: That comedy film was really funny last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚那部喜剧电影真好笑。

Example_EN: What do you want to do in the future?
Example_CN: 你将来想做什么？

Example_EN: Shall we play a board game after dinner?
Example_CN: 晚饭后我们玩桌游好吗？

Example_EN: The children are playing in the garden now.
Example_CN: 孩子们现在在花园里玩。

Collocation: garlic bread;clove of garlic;smell of garlic
Example_EN: She added garlic to the pasta sauce tonight.
Example_CN: 她今晚在意面酱里加大蒜。

Collocation: natural gas;gas station;run out of gas
Example_EN: Please open a window; there is a gas smell.
Example_CN: 请开窗，有煤气味。

Example_EN: We will meet at the school gate at eight.
Example_CN: 我们八点在学校门口见面。

Example_EN: In general, students prefer shorter homework.
Example_CN: 一般说来，学生更喜欢较短的作业。

Example_EN: We have a geography lesson on Wednesday.
Example_CN: 我们周三有地理课。
MemoryTip: geo + graphy：关于地球表面的学问。

Example_EN: I usually get home at six in the evening.
Example_CN: 我通常晚上六点到家。

Example_EN: The little girl held her mother's hand tightly.
Example_CN: 小女孩紧紧拉着妈妈的手。

Example_EN: He went to the cinema with his girlfriend.
Example_CN: 他和女朋友一起去看了电影。
MemoryTip: girl + friend：恋爱中的女性伴侣。

Example_EN: Please give this book to your teacher tomorrow.
Example_CN: 请明天把这本书交给老师。

Example_EN: She drank a glass of water after running.
Example_CN: 跑步后她喝了一杯水。

Example_EN: I go to school by bus every morning.
Example_CN: 我每天早上坐公交去学校。

Example_EN: Our team scored a goal in the last minute.
Example_CN: 我们队在最后一分钟进了一球。

Example_EN: She won a gold medal in the swimming race.
Example_CN: 她在游泳比赛中获得金牌。
MemoryTip: gold：贵重金属，金色象征第一。

Example_EN: She is good at maths and science at school.
Example_CN: 她在学校数学和科学都很好。

Example_EN: We said goodbye at the station this morning.
Example_CN: 今早我们在车站道别。

Example_EN: My grandfather tells me stories every Sunday.
Example_CN: 爷爷每个周日给我讲故事。

Example_EN: I visit my grandmother every other weekend.
Example_CN: 我每隔一个周末去看望奶奶。
MemoryTip: grand + mother：母亲或父亲的母亲。

Example_EN: She bought a bunch of green grapes today.
Example_CN: 她今天买了一串青葡萄。

Collocation: on the grass;cut the grass;green grass
Example_EN: Please do not walk on the wet grass.
Example_CN: 请不要在湿草地上走。

Example_EN: That was a great idea for our school trip.
Example_CN: 那对我们学校旅行来说是个好主意。

Example_EN: I prefer green tea to black coffee.
Example_CN: 我喜欢绿茶多于黑咖啡。

Example_EN: The sky looks grey before the rain starts.
Example_CN: 下雨前天空看起来灰蒙蒙的。
MemoryTip: 英式 grey；美式常拼 gray。

Example_EN: Please do not throw paper on the ground.
Example_CN: 请不要往地上扔纸。

Example_EN: We worked in a small group during the project.
Example_CN: 项目期间我们在一个小组里工作。

Example_EN: Tomatoes grow quickly in warm summer weather.
Example_CN: 西红柿在温暖的夏天长得很快。

Example_EN: Can you guess the answer to this question?
Example_CN: 你能猜出这个问题的答案吗？

Example_EN: We have a guest staying with us tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚有客人住在我们家。

Example_EN: Our tour guide explained the old castle history.
Example_CN: 导游讲解了古城堡的历史。
MemoryTip: guide：带路或提供指引的人/书。

Example_EN: He is learning to play the guitar this year.
Example_CN: 他今年在学弹吉他。

Example_EN: Children should not play with a toy gun at school.
Example_CN: 孩子不应在学校玩玩具枪。

Example_EN: He seems like a really nice guy to me.
Example_CN: 在我看来他是个好人。
MemoryTip: guy：口语里对男人/伙计的称呼。

Collocation: at the gym;school gym;go to the gym
Example_EN: I go to the gym three times a week.
Example_CN: 我每周去三次健身房。
MemoryTip: gym 是 gymnasium 的缩写。

Example_EN: Reading before bed is a good habit for me.
Example_CN: 睡前阅读对我来说是个好习惯。

Example_EN: She has long brown hair and brown eyes.
Example_CN: 她有棕色长发和棕色眼睛。
MemoryTip: hair：头上的毛发（整体常作不可数）。

Example_EN: The film starts in half an hour from now.
Example_CN: 电影半小时后开始。

Example_EN: The concert will be held in the school hall.
Example_CN: 音乐会将在学校礼堂举行。

Example_EN: Please raise your hand if you know the answer.
Example_CN: 如果知道答案请举手。
MemoryTip: hand：手上的那只手，也可递交。

Example_EN: What happened to your phone yesterday evening?
Example_CN: 你手机昨天晚上去哪儿了？

Example_EN: The children look happy in the new playground.
Example_CN: 孩子们在新操场上显得很开心。

Example_EN: She works hard to improve her English every day.
Example_CN: 她每天努力提高英语。

Collocation: put on a hat;sun hat;hat shop
Example_EN: Wear a hat if you sit in the sun long.
Example_CN: 如果在太阳下坐很久，请戴帽子。

Example_EN: I hate getting up early on cold winter mornings.
Example_CN: 我讨厌在寒冷冬日早起。

Example_EN: We usually have breakfast at seven o'clock.
Example_CN: 我们通常七点吃早饭。

Example_EN: He wants to study art at university next year.
Example_CN: 他明年想在大学学艺术。

Example_EN: She shook her head and said nothing more.
Example_CN: 她摇了摇头，没再说什么。
MemoryTip: head：身体最上端，也指负责人。

Example_EN: I stayed home because of a bad headache.
Example_CN: 我因为严重头痛待在家里。

Example_EN: Exercise is important for your health every day.
Example_CN: 每天锻炼对你的健康很重要。
MemoryTip: health：身体与精神的良好状态。

Example_EN: Fruit and vegetables help you stay healthy.
Example_CN: 水果和蔬菜帮你保持健康。

Example_EN: Did you hear about the school sports day?
Example_CN: 你听说学校运动会的事了吗？
MemoryTip: hear：声音进入耳朵；listen 是有意去听。

Example_EN: I learned this poem by heart last week.
Example_CN: 我上周把这首诗背下来了。

Example_EN: Please heat up the soup before you eat it.
Example_CN: 喝汤前请先加热。

Example_EN: This bag is too heavy for me to carry.
Example_CN: 这个包太重我拿不动。

Example_EN: What is the height of this mountain, please?
Example_CN: 请问这座山有多高？

Example_EN: She said hello to her new neighbours kindly.
Example_CN: 她友好地跟新邻居打了招呼。

Example_EN: Can you help me with this heavy box?
Example_CN: 你能帮我搬这个重箱子吗？

Example_EN: This is her favourite song of all time.
Example_CN: 这是她有史以来最喜欢的歌。

Example_EN: Please come here and look at this picture.
Example_CN: 请过来看这张图片。

Example_EN: That blue umbrella by the door is hers.
Example_CN: 门边那把蓝伞是她的。
MemoryTip: hers：名词性物主代词，后不接名词。

Example_EN: She finished the project by herself yesterday.
Example_CN: 她昨天自己完成了这个项目。

Example_EN: Hey, wait for me at the bus stop!
Example_CN: 嘿，在公交车站等我！

Example_EN: Hi, my name is Anna and I am new here.
Example_CN: 嗨，我叫安娜，我是新来的。
MemoryTip: hi：比 hello 更随意的招呼。

Example_EN: She got a high score on the English test.
Example_CN: 她英语考试得了高分。

Collocation: up the hill;green hill;over the hill
Example_EN: We walked up the hill to see the view.
Example_CN: 我们走上小山去看风景。

Example_EN: Please give him this message after class.
Example_CN: 请在课后把这个口信给他。

Example_EN: He taught himself English by watching films.
Example_CN: 他通过看电影自学英语。

Example_EN: This is his seat, please do not take it.
Example_CN: 这是他的座位，请不要坐。

Example_EN: We learned about ancient Rome in history class.
Example_CN: 我们在历史课上学习了古罗马。

Collocation: favourite hobby;hobby of;take up a hobby
Example_EN: Reading is my favourite hobby after school.
Example_CN: 阅读是我放学后最喜欢的爱好。

Example_EN: We went on holiday to Spain last August.
Example_CN: 去年八月我们去西班牙度假了。
MemoryTip: 英式 holiday；美式常说 vacation。

Example_EN: I usually do my homework at home after school.
Example_CN: 我通常放学后在家写作业。

Example_EN: Have you finished your homework for tomorrow?
Example_CN: 明天的作业你做完了吗？

Example_EN: Please be honest about what really happened.
Example_CN: 请诚实地说明到底发生了什么。
MemoryTip: honest：说真话、不撒谎；h 不发音。

Example_EN: I hope to visit Japan next summer holiday.
Example_CN: 我希望明年暑假去日本。

Example_EN: She learned to ride a horse last summer.
Example_CN: 她去年夏天学会了骑马。

Example_EN: He stayed in hospital for two days last week.
Example_CN: 他上周住院两天。
MemoryTip: 英式 in hospital（不加 the）常指住院。

Example_EN: It was too hot to play outside at noon.
Example_CN: 正午太热，没法在外面玩。

Collocation: hotel room;book a hotel;at the hotel
Example_EN: We booked a hotel near the railway station.
Example_CN: 我们在火车站附近订了酒店。

Example_EN: The meeting will last about one hour today.
Example_CN: 今天会议大约持续一小时。

Example_EN: They bought a new house near the river.
Example_CN: 他们在河边买了一栋新房子。
MemoryTip: house：建筑物本身；home 更重“家”的感觉。

Example_EN: How do you usually go to school each day?
Example_CN: 你每天通常怎么去学校？

Example_EN: I was tired; however, I finished my homework.
Example_CN: 我很累；然而我还是完成了作业。

Example_EN: There are about two hundred books on this shelf.
Example_CN: 这个架子上大约有两百本书。

Example_EN: I feel hungry after playing football outside.
Example_CN: 在外面踢完足球后我感到饿了。

Collocation: her husband;husband and wife;become a husband
Example_EN: Her husband works at the city hospital.
Example_CN: 她丈夫在市医院工作。

Example_EN: I am learning English because I like films.
Example_CN: 我学英语是因为我喜欢电影。
MemoryTip: I：说话者自己；写作须大写。

Example_EN: Would you like some ice in your drink?
Example_CN: 你饮料里要加冰吗？

Example_EN: That sounds like a good idea for the weekend.
Example_CN: 那听起来是个不错的周末主意。

Example_EN: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
Example_CN: 如果明天下雨，我们就待在家里。

Example_EN: She stayed in bed because she felt ill.
Example_CN: 她因为感到不适而躺在床上。

Example_EN: The website shows an image of the hotel room.
Example_CN: 网站上显示了酒店房间的图片。
